entities.name: SORGHUM BICOLOR
entities.description: The crop species being bred for resistance and tolerance against Striga hermonthica

entities.name: STRIGA HERMONTHICA
entities.description: A hemi-parasitic weed that infests sorghum

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to prevent or limit the infection and growth of Striga hermonthica

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum to maintain yield despite being infested by Striga hermonthica

entities.name: STRIGA INFESTATION
entities.description: The state of being infected by Striga hermonthica, categorized by low, high, and intermediate levels

entities.name: RELATIVE YIELD LOSS
entities.description: A measure representing the combined effect of resistance and tolerance on crop yield

entities.name: AGAR-GEL ASSAY
entities.description: A laboratory method used to determine resistance during the below-ground stages of the parasite

entities.name: POT TRIAL
entities.description: A controlled trial used to determine resistance during the below-ground stages of the parasite

entities.name: SPLIT-PLOT DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental field layout used to grow sorghum genotypes with and without Striga infestation

entities.name: CORRELATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to demonstrate the importance of resistance and tolerance as yield determining traits

entities.name: ASNPC
entities.description: Area under the Striga number progress curve, a discriminative selection measure for resistance

entities.name: NSMAX
entities.description: Maximum above-ground Striga number, a discriminative selection measure for resistance

entities.name: LINEAR CORRECTION
entities.description: A method used to correct for differences in infection level resulting from genotypic differences in resistance
